Seishinkai

Karate for Modern Life
Health.
Discipline.
Self-Defense.

Seishinkai

Seishinkai is a traditional karate dojo that values personal growth, physical well-being, and health over competition. For more than 50 years, we have been active mainly in Sapporo, welcoming students from ages 3 to 83. For children, karate supports healthy physical development and discipline. For adults and seniors, it provides a way to maintain fitness and overall well-being. For women, it offers practical self-defense skills. We provide instruction tailored to each individual’s age and goals, while also offering classes for students who are not currently attending school and welcoming international participants. Our dojo is a place where everyone can learn and train with confidence in a safe and supportive environment.

For kids

Improve coordination, discipline, and confidence

For adults & seniors

Gentle full-body exercise and breathing techniques for health

For women

Practical self-defense and awareness training

For everyone

Build strength, resilience, and overall wellbeing

Location

Please Note

Our office is staffed on a rotating schedule, so phone calls may not always be answered during office hours. If you are unable to reach us, please contact us by email.
